name: ultracode
description: Transparent, adaptive multi-agent software engineering orchestration for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Keeps the user in control while it inspects, decomposes, delegates, verifies, implements, validates, and synthesizes complex engineering work. Includes guided project initialization, safe configuration editing, live status, Codex and Claude Code adapters, and data-driven swarms whose size follows the problem rather than a preset number.
defaultPrompt: Use $ultracode to execute this task end to end.
Use $ultracode-status to show the live work state.
